analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces a webinar titled 'The EU and the US under Biden: A New Beginning or Nostalgic Reminiscence?' featuring Josep Borrell and invites users to watch live. It is a neutral event promotion without evaluative claims about the EU. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (EU successful story) – not promoted; no mention of EU successes or historical achievements. EU2 (EU united) – not promoted; no claim of unity or solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for citizens) – not promoted; no reference to EU policies benefiting citizens. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – not promoted; no claim of EU pioneering action. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – not promoted; no assertion about defending rights or democracy. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – not promoted; no mention of global cooperation or contributions. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed narrative.
